title: Official Rebuilds GuideBook Entry File 10
wikitext:
[]: Official Rebuild's GuideBook (Entry File 1.0)             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Thu Nov 01, 2007 4:37 am " ENTRY FILE 1 " 128p/B5. Price ~$11. Also, plz someone present them a scanner at Christmas V_v EDIT: also here from tomorrow.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Nov 01, 2007 5:05 am Me want. Thanks. p.s Am i the only one that thinks Shinji is a lot hotter in R?

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Thu Nov 01, 2007 5:16 am the_seventh_child wrote: Am i the only one that thinks Shinji is a lot hotter in R?

[]:             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Thu Nov 01, 2007 6:13 am Wow, that book looks really nice. Now if only I could read the Japanese to order it. It loks like it contains some new images from 2.0, because I can't remember the one with Kaworu standing on the moon.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Thu Nov 01, 2007 7:06 am Wow, that looks fantastic! The new LCL plant looks infinitely cooler than the one in the original series. Who's that standing, seemingly naked, in front of Lilith? Also, doesn't Lilith's body look a lot more .... masculine in those pictures? Someone will put that on an English eBay site and when they do, I'm buying!

[]:             Quote Post by Yasha » Thu Nov 01, 2007 9:12 am It seems to me that it's Kaworu, because this picture is on the same site with two other pictures of him. Also, the naked guy's hair look a lot like Kaworu's.

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Thu Nov 01, 2007 9:30 am the_seventh_child wrote: p.s Am i the only one that thinks Shinji is a lot hotter in R?

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Thu Nov 01, 2007 12:16 pm this is my next eva buy for sure!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Nov 01, 2007 3:21 pm I already made a partial scan of all the text and some of the pictures of the program: someone can host it somewhere else if they want. The book itself doesn't like to be laid flat, some of the glue at the binding start to come apart when I tried scanning some of the first pages.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 01, 2007 3:49 pm Ooh, the sketch of Rei's smile for Rebuild is nice. Only thing is it kinda looks Death-ish, but I think she has more of a smile here. So the mask that White Giant (Adam?????) has on isn't the same mask Lilith wears?? (Supposedly she has a different mask in Rebuild.) @ Ornette: Thanks!

[]: Wanted merchandise             Quote Post by XX » Thu Nov 01, 2007 6:30 pm 1/11/07 GMT -- · Evangelion the Movie Guide Book #1 Yen Price: 1,200 (Merchandise Only). About $10.40 USD; €7.18 Euros Stock Status: Nov. Release Shipping Information: Sorry, not available * · HobbyLink Japan - HLJ Help Page / FAQ [url]http://www.hlj.com/faq/hljfaq.html[/url] *You can see the estimated shipping costs and procedures here: · HobbyLink Japan - HLJ Shipping Information [url]http://www.hlj.com/hlj_shipping.html[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Thu Nov 01, 2007 7:11 pm Rodeo wrote: The somewhat bizarre way that image is set up leads me to believe that Kaworu in some angelic mumbo-jumbo manner is observing past events, years prior to the continuity of the movies.

[]:             Quote Post by marmotgirl » Thu Nov 01, 2007 7:40 pm Oh god dammit I only got paid YESTERDAY and it's already almost gone... Curse you, Rebuild, and all the shiny, buyable shit you leave in your wake.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Thu Nov 01, 2007 9:33 pm so does this mean Ill be able to get my grubby hands on that movie book CtHuLhU posted the lilth thingy pictures of? YAY

[]:             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Fri Nov 02, 2007 4:16 am It looks like part of it is part of the theatre book I bought just before the movie. The part Ornette uploaded is pretty much the theatre edition booklet. Thanks for the link! I know what I'll be pre-ordering shortly.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Nov 02, 2007 10:37 pm Wevangeliwon wrote: It looks like part of it is part of the theatre book I bought just before the movie. The part Ornette uploaded is pretty much the theatre edition booklet.

[]:             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Fri Nov 02, 2007 10:50 pm The theatre book might be part of this Entry File, but this is 128 pages. So 100 pages on and it could be. Although, for those who haven't seen the theatre book, it still is really good.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 02, 2007 11:02 pm The photo showing the two pages of stills from the final scene seems to indicate this is 1.0's answer to the film books Newtype put out for the original movies -- cut-by-cut stills accompanied by script --, albeit with extra goodies. The movie pamphlet is a separate entity, in any case.

[]: Re: Official Rebuild's GuideBook             Quote Post by Sceleris » Sat Nov 03, 2007 12:29 am Uh, that thing attached to the white giant's left arm... is that an IV drip? Then again, given the look of it, I'd say it needs one -- maybe its S² is broken... or taken out and placed in Eva-06! You see that zigzag pattern on the chest? That's where they cut it open.

[]:             Quote Post by Apathetic Piggy » Sat Nov 03, 2007 2:37 am It's just not an official Evangelion product unless there's a child's ass visable on it. The book looks good, though. Makes me regret having not yet seen Rebuild 1.0.
summary:

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Nov 01, 2007 5:05 am Me want. Thanks. p.s Am i the only one that thinks Shinji is a l
